dict.string: Live Meeting Helper captures system audio to transcribe and generate meeting notes.
Live Meeting Helper records your microphone to transcribe and generate meeting notes.
Live Meeting Helper does not use your Photo Library directly. This access is requested by the Claude CLI helper process that generates meeting notes.
Live Meeting Helper may access Desktop when you select a document to attach to your meeting.
Live Meeting Helper may access Downloads when you select a document to attach to your meeting.
Live Meeting Helper may access Documents when you select a document to attach to your meeting.
Live Meeting Helper may read configuration files (such as AWS credentials) that reside on network-mounted drives.
Live Meeting Helper may access removable drives when you select a document to attach to your meeting.
